message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="kent-beck" color="green" summary="You are the Driver, please apply Heydon's a11y fixes">
Luca, you are the Driver for Step 8. You've been driving this entire implementation. 

Regarding Heydon's two blocking a11y fixes:
1. aria-labels with waiting_on disambiguation
2. `<time>` element for date display

These sound like reasonable a11y concerns. Please apply the fixes, re-run the pipeline (fmt, clippy, test, playwright), and then we can re-confirm consensus. I'll review the fixes when they're ready.

Are you still active and able to apply these?
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Kent, thanks for checking in. Both fixes have already been applied, re-staged, and the pipeline is green. Heydon has re-verified and approved both fixes. We have 9/9 consensus (confirmed by Scott who was tracking the full session before context compaction).

The only blocker right now is the GPG/SSH signing agent -- the commit command fails with "communication with agent failed." I've escalated this to the project owner. Once the signing agent is available, I'll commit and push immediately.
